description: Reference per-step training losses for the built-in tiny_lm (Transformer) model. Recorded BEFORE the v0.1.8 model_profiles schema change, using an equivalent dict-form `model:` recipe. The round-trip test (tests/experiments/test_mamba3_round_trip.py) runs the PROFILE-form recipe (mamba3_transformer_recipe.yaml) through the new model_profiles selector and asserts these losses reproduce. This guards against (a) numerical drift introduced by the model_profiles refactor and (b) a transcription error in the transformer profile params. The comparison is honest (post-rewrite vs pre-recorded), not circular.

provenance.recorded_with: lighttrain train -c <transient dict-form recipe>, before A1/A2 landed
provenance.determinism: bit-identical across 2 consecutive runs on this hardware

tolerance_note: On the recording hardware the reproduction is bit-identical; use a small atol (e.g. 1e-2) in the assertion to stay robust across GPU/driver differences, since bf16 reduction order is hardware-dependent.
